mapper.select: SELECT gr.resident_id, r.room_number, r.name, SUM(gr.points_earned) as total_points, @rownum := @rownum + 1 as rank FROM garbage_record gr INNER JOIN resident r ON gr.resident_id = r.id WHERE gr.deleted = 0 AND r.deleted = 0 AND YEAR(gr.create_time) = #{year} AND MONTH(gr.create_time) = #{month} GROUP BY gr.resident_id, r.room_number, r.name HAVING total_points > 0 ORDER BY total_points DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT gr.resident_id, r.room_number, r.name, SUM(gr.points_earned) as total_points, @rownum := @rownum + 1 as rank FROM garbage_record gr INNER JOIN resident r ON gr.resident_id = r.id WHERE gr.deleted = 0 AND r.deleted = 0 GROUP BY gr.resident_id, r.room_number, r.name HAVING total_points > 0 ORDER BY total_points DESC LIMIT #{limit}
